caveats: Synthetic demo return attribution only; production use needs approved real targets and benchmarks.
Dollar P&L is gated because no reliable beginning portfolio value is available.
headline_interpretation: The policy bridge ties to actual portfolio return with separated policy design, allocation drift, and manager implementation effects.

source_actual_portfolio_return_reconcili.meaning: The policy scaffold uses current revaluation marks for actual weights; the existing calculated attribution pack uses its own synthetic period return basis.
